job_8bit_loadscreen.name: C64 Title Loader
job_8bit_loadscreen.description: A local pirate syndicate needs a fast-loading, multicolor title picture for their latest game cracktro. Pay up to 250 on timely delivery.

job_8bit_rasterscroller.name: Rasterbar Demo Routine
job_8bit_rasterscroller.description: A rival crew commissioning a hand-optimized raster-bar routine for their upcoming competition entry. Cash on delivery, two-week deadline.

job_8bit_chiptuneset.name: Chiptune Pack A
job_8bit_chiptuneset.description: A Swedish-British BBS op wants four 30-second SID chiptunes for use as intros across their voting boards. Pays handsomely.

job_16bit_modepacker.name: Amiga MOD Packager
job_16bit_modepacker.description: Build a small CLI utility that wraps a ProTracker module and the boot block in a single adf-friendly format. Local scene pays for polish.

job_16bit_introart.name: Amiga 64KB Intro Logo
job_16bit_introart.description: Polish a 320x256 hi-color pixel logo with copper-driven gradients. Crowd-pleaser at next year's Breakpoint.

job_16bit_trackerpack.name: Hardcore 4-Channel Album
job_16bit_trackerpack.description: Compose a 12-minute OST in the style of early Future Crew. Use of any non-pd samples forbidden; pure synthesis required.

job_pc_texturelibrary.name: Texture Atlas Library
job_pc_texturelibrary.description: Write a static-linkable C library exporting procedural marble / brick / wood textures. PC scene royalty split.

job_pc_voxelengine.name: Voxel Engine License
job_pc_voxelengine.description: License a turnkey voxel raycasting height-field engine (works like an early Comanche). Buyer pays for the source.

job_pc_shareware_pack.name: Demoscene VJ Toolkit
job_pc_shareware_pack.description: Bundle a selection of your released effects into a $5 registration-ware visualizer. BBS upload + shareware license split.

job_modern_sdfintro.name: SDF 4K Intro Library
job_modern_sdfintro.description: Build a reusable signed-distance function library that other crews can drop into 4K intros. Royalty stacking enabled.

job_modern_introfilm.name: Cinematic 64K Intro Film
job_modern_introfilm.description: A late-era sponsor commissions a cinematic 64KB intro built around procedural texture renders. Big royalty up front.

job_modern_synthsize.name: Byte-Sized Music Synth
job_modern_synthsize.description: Produce a 4 KB music synthesizer library byte-for-byte smaller than the existing Farbrausch reference. Bonus on competitive benchmark.
